name: APIKey
description: A common path of strong wind that affects sailing and storms.

name: Action
description: An action that can be taken by an object

name: Activity
description: Something being performed by an object in the universe. This is then tracked as part of the object performing it and the universe emits a handlable event with the activity's ID and a suffix of ':start', ':channel', and ':finish'. Channel only occurring if the universe time moves forward and the activity has not completed, but channel is fired with every step, use universe time and the activity.last_channel to track.

name: Alignment
description: Acts as a generally summary for how this entity may act.

name: Audio
description: An audio clip that can be played either locally, on a client device, or streamed to a sound system. Different circumstances require different fields. Sonos streaming requires a URL. Client play requires data.

name: Backlog
description: Stores an ordered array of tasks and saves associated releases.

name: Calendar
description: A location in the universe that is of importance. Possibly a point such as a city on a world map, a simple path with lines tracing it, or an area with a defined perimeter and area

name: Capability
description: Tracks a performable action for a device or similar physical control. Aimed at tracking thigns such as 'capability:audio' and 'capability:audio:sonos'.

name: Category
description: A quick classifier for describing key properties of objects like skirmishes, knowledge or events

name: Class
description: A specialized class that an entity can pick up

name: Conditional
description: Represents a conditional addition to the object's properties.

name: DM Release
description: Collection of tasks that have been completed. This is used for task projection and marking updates to notify players. Additional aid is wrapped around driving Hint creation from player affecting tasks to help ensure awareness of changes.

name: DM Task
description: Details a task to be done. Used for keeping notes of things that need completed or follow up.

name: Damage Type
description: A form of damage that can occur

name: Dashboard
description: Describes the layout of widgets on a Dashboard

name: Dataset
description: Collections of data, usual for randomization/generation purposes

name: Day
description: A day of a week in a month. This is used to describe various characteristics and serves as the base for building out a calendar.

name: Device
description: A physical point on the network. This is primarily a loading point for discovery processes.

name: Discovery
description: Represents an internal process that handles locating physical assets and either loading devices or updating existing devices based on IDs and the process that discovery uses to generate the IDs.

name: Effect
description: An effect on an object. Expiration is tracked via chronicle. These may subtract slots directly, or add through conditionals.

name: Enchantment
description: Magical enchantment empowering an object

name: Entity
description: Generally a kind of living or interactable object within the Universe.

name: Equipment Set
description: A pre-defined set of items to equip

name: Error
description: Error representation

name: Event
description: An event in the universe such as a fight, important discussion, or world happening

name: Feat
description: An inherant feature of this object that improves or diminishes this object

name: Festival
description: A celebratory day

name: Gender
description: Sexuality of an entity.

name: God
description: A God in the universe.

name: Handler
description: Definition to handle an occurrence of an event or other action within the universe

name: Hint
description: Collection of tasks that have been completed. This is used for task projection and marking updates to notify players. Additional aid is wrapped around driving Hint creation

name: Image
description: Images to tie to objects for display

name: Item
description: An item used by entities

name: Jetstream
description: A common path of strong wind that affects sailing and storms.

name: Journal
description: Collection of notes

name: Knowledge
description: Knowledge held by an entity in the universe.

name: Library
description: An instantiated class from the processor script that is referencable in Processors

name: Location
description: A location in the universe that is of importance. Possibly a point such as a city on a world map, a simple path with lines tracing it, or an area with a defined perimeter and area

name: Meeting
description: Stores data for a game meeting

name: Minigame
description: Describes the state of a mini-game

name: Month
description: A sectional period of time in a calendar

name: Moon
description: A celestial object in orbit of a location that affects weather, lighting, or the view and is tracked as part of the calendar

name: Nation
description: A nation or empire in the universe.

name: Occurrence
description: Mapping for Universe simulation event emissions

name: Page
description: A page in any set of journals. This is to allow replication of information across multiple journals and facilitate sharing with other players without duplication.

name: Party
description: Group of entities.

name: Player
description: Player information for connecting to the universe

name: Playlist
description: Collection of

name: Primary Stat
description: A primary stat for an entity

name: Proficiency
description: Representative of an abstract skill such as a language or weapon usage

name: Profile
description: Describes a user's set of settings

name: Quest
description: Specific entry for objectives.

name: Reaction
description: Handles reacting to a specified event in the universe server side

name: Recipe
description: Defines how to create something, such as herbs for alchemy, or ore for blacksmithing.

name: Repetition
description: Describes time based repeition of some object.

name: Room Control
description: Stores data for a room where the game is being played for control points, such as house controlled light devices and audio endpoints.

name: Season
description: A season of expected weather

name: Session
description: Tracks a Player connection session

name: Setting
description: Universe values

name: Skill
description: A performable skill

name: Skirmish
description: A fight.

name: Slot
description: An entry where an item can be placed in association with another object.

name: Soundscape
description: Describes a sequence of Audio objects and relative destination objects in the configured destination arrangement through which to play those audio objects.

name: Spell
description: Spell

name: State
description: A general state for something such as 'Deceased', 'Active', or 'Unconscious'.

name: Storm
description: A temporary or persistant weather effect in a radial area that may encompass locations. The goal within is to force weather effects on locations or entities in the area automatically.

name: Sun
description: Star that a world orbits and controls how/when night/day starts

name: Type
description: Indicates the type of object here-in for game purposes. Such as 'weapon' or 'ranged' and are for use incombination in determing or displaying properties for the object.

name: User Bar
description: Stores an array of actions that a user can quickly select.

name: Weather
description: Temporary environmental effects of a location. Can also have a location and a range to act as a 'Storm' and force a weather effect on locations within range. Locations will need to have their ${map_distance}$ values specified in order for a storm state to work as that is needed to determine distances.

name: Widget
description: Describes a widget available in the UI. The attributes specify available values for configuration and offer a string on field usage or an array of options.

name: World
description: A world to offer to users for alternative realms to join for games
